ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset in bytes */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the dataset was last updated */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "license" TEXT /* License under which the dataset is distributed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "architecture" TEXT /* Architecture of the model (e.g., CNN, RNN, transformers) */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for model training */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the model was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the model was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the model */,
  "training_duration" TEXT /* Duration it took to train the model */,
  "training_loss" REAL /* Final training loss of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the model */,
  "author" TEXT /* Researcher who created the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "layers" (
  "layer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each layer */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the layer belongs to */,
  "layer_type" TEXT /* Type of the layer (e.g., convolutional, recurrent, fully connected) */,
  "layer_name" TEXT /* Name of the layer */,
  "input_shape" TEXT /* Input shape for the layer */,
  "output_shape" TEXT /* Output shape for the layer */,
  "activation_function" TEXT /* Activation function used in the layer */,
  "regularization" TEXT /* Type of regularization used in the layer */,
  "dropout_rate" REAL /* Dropout rate for the layer */,
  "batch_normalization" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether batch normalization is used */,
  "layer_order" INTEGER /* Order of the layer in the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("layer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_layers_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the hyperparameter belongs to */,
  "layer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the layer the hyperparameter belongs to */,
  "hyperparameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter (e.g., learning rate, number of hidden layers) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the hyperparameter */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the hyperparameter */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value of the hyperparameter */,
  "range_min" TEXT /* Minimum value for the hyperparameter */,
  "range_max" TEXT /* Maximum value for the hyperparameter */,
  "tunable" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the hyperparameter is tunable */,
  "tuning_method" TEXT /* Method used for tuning the hyperparameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_layer_id FOREIGN KEY ("layer_id") REFERENCES layers ("layer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the result belongs to */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for evaluation */,
  "test_accuracy" REAL /* Test accuracy of the model */,
  "val_accuracy" REAL /* Validation accuracy of the model */,
  "training_accuracy" REAL /* Training accuracy of the model */,
  "test_loss" REAL /* Test loss of the model */,
  "val_loss" REAL /* Validation loss of the model */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score of the model */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the model */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the model */,
  "confusion_matrix" TEXT /* Confusion matrix of the model */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date the model was evaluated */,
  "model_version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version used for evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_results_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_results_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_results_model_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Institution or organization the researcher is affiliated with */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the researcher joined the platform */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date of the last activity by the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_configurations" (
  "configuration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the configuration belongs to */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who shared the configuration */,
  "configuration_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the configuration */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the configuration was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the configuration was last updated */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* List of researchers the configuration is shared with */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the configuration is public */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("configuration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_configurations_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_configurations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the version belongs to */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the version */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* Researcher who created the version */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Brief changelog for the version */,
  "model_configuration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model configuration used in the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_configuration_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_configuration_id") REFERENCES model_configurations ("configuration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who received the notification */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the notification belongs to */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification */,
  "notification_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the notification type */,
  "model_version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version related to the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_model_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
